form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr5) over 1760m after showing early speed at Narrabri, beaten 25 m by Katastrophee (2:08.90) in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $26. At the start before 4th (Fr1) over 1760m after showing early pace at Narrabri, beaten 8 m by Seven Rippin Aces (2:10.70) in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $2.90. The ace draw may see a better showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped away when the start was affected.
Worked forward at the start to lead the event around the 1300m.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 10th (Fr1) over 1720m at Penrith beaten 45 m by Miss Blue Stork (2:02.60) in NR up to 47 on March 20 at $14. The start before 8th (Fr2) over 1720m after showing early pace at Penrith was 5th-9.05 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Grey Cadillac (2:03.60) in NR up to 48 on March 12 at $26. Should get his chance from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered behind the weakening Olivia Shannon between the 400 and 200m.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she 10th (Fr4) over 1980m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 40 m by Ohwhatiwouldgive (2:27.40) in NR up to 53 on December 11 at $71. Has trialled well so may be worth including.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 6th-11.36 beaten 18 m by Whiskey Royale (1:57.50) in NR 39 to 44 on March 26 at $2.90. Race fit now and capable of better.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Katastrophee at Narrabri over 1760m in a NR up to 45 on April 12 at $7.50. Performed better the start before with a game effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 1760m after being wide early at Narrabri beaten 3.5 m by Seven Rippin Aces (2:10.70) in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $2.60. With luck from the back row he can continue the good form.
